source: live techbrot.com JS (assets/js/contact.js, intent-map.js, contact-intents.js — absent from repo, fetched live; archived in this folder) + form markup in repo HTML

endpoint.defined_in: contact.js line 19 (const inside IIFE); also hardcoded as form action on the 5 state-pillar intake forms
endpoint.fallback_rule: empty string '' = skip fetch, allow native form POST to the form's action attribute (/contact/submit on the contact page)
endpoint.target_in_rebuild: _data/site.json formEndpoint — single source, no hardcoded URLs in templates or JS

transport.success_condition: response JSON has ok truthy OR result === 'success' (also accepts non-JSON 2xx via { ok: r.ok })
transport.error_behavior: inline role=alert error with mailto:info@techbrot.com fallback; button re-enabled; double-submit guarded
transport.success_behavior: form hidden, success panel injected (greeting uses first name), focus moved to panel

key_notes.consent: checkbox — 'agreed' when checked, '' when not (validation requires checked)
key_notes.services: ARRAY of checked [data-service-input] values, e.g. ['cleanup','payroll']; the only non-string value
key_notes.industry: QUIRK (preserve exactly): collect() first reads the visible select name='industry', then the [data-meta] loop OVERWRITES payload.industry with the hidden input name='industry_intent' (data-meta='industry') — even when empty. The user's selected industry never reaches the payload key 'industry' unless contact-intents.js wrote it from URL params. The select's value is effectively dropped. Port as-is; Apps Script must keep working unchanged.
key_notes.data_meta_fields: hidden inputs filled client-side by contact-intents.js from URL params: intent, state, city, industry, service, source_page (falls back to document.referrer), source_type, funnel_stage, urgency, operator_candidate; written ALWAYS, even with no ?intent=

state_intake_forms.transport: NATIVE form POST directly to the Apps Script URL (action attribute) — application/x-www-form-urlencoded, no JS interception found on these pages

footer_subscribe_form.note: no JS handler found in repo or live JS files fetched — endpoint existence unverified

analytics_current_state.ga4: gtag.js G-K2Z8GK69Z5 loaded on all pages
analytics_current_state.lead_submit_event: DOES NOT EXIST in current contact.js — NEW requirement for the rebuild
analytics_current_state.phone_click_event: DOES NOT EXIST in current JS — NEW requirement for the rebuild

intent_engine_behavior.files: intent-map.js (data: TB_INTENT_MAP 88 base keys + TB_LOOKUPS state/city/industry tables) + contact-intents.js (engine)
intent_engine_behavior.resolution_order: 1) exact key in TB_INTENT_MAP · 2) state-pillar fallback __state_pillar__/__state_advisory__ for <state> / <state>-advisory slugs via TB_LOOKUPS · 3) unknown intent = default copy, metadata still captured
intent_engine_behavior.swaps: headline, lede, submit CTA copy, pre-selected service checkbox
